ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Off Calendar

ARBITRATOR DECISION ACCEPTANCE CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Arbitration Judgment Filed

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And That Req.'S For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Douglas Alan Holloway, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Bank of the West

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Bank of the West's Motion for order compelling answers to interrogatories and that requests for admissions be deemed admitted, and for monetary sanctions, granted in part, denied in part:
1. Motion to compel answers to interrogatories granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's interrogatories within fifteen days of notice of entry of this order;
2. As to plaintiff's motion that requests for admissions be deemed admitted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's requests for admissions within fifteen days of notice of entry of this order;
c. If defendant fails to serve responses in compliance with this order, the request for admission will be deemed admitted without further motion, or application to the court;
3. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue on the sum of $390.00, to run against defendant (and not its counsel), payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
